description: UK digital health platform formed by merger of Doctor Care Anytime, Qure, and Doctoron. Provides telemedicine, digital GP services, and occupational health to employers and insurers across Europe.
business_model: B2B - Digital health services to employers and insurers
competitive_advantage: Pan-European presence, integrated health services, employer focus

varden_fit.rationale: COMPETITOR - Digital occupational health provider in Europe
